§6Big-Ass Tank 9000§f provides §bmassive fluid storage capacity§f.

§eCapacity:§f
Far exceeds standard tanks - when you need serious storage.

§eUses:§f
• Large-scale fluid operations
• Buffer for industrial processes
• Emergency reserves

§aTip:§f For when standard tanks aren't cutting it - truly massive storage.
